Patch Set 4: Code-Review+1

(1 comment)

Patch Set 4: Code-Review-1

One issue I noticed is that test-framework.sh::lustre_build_version() is not yet prepared to handle the "bare" value in "lctl get_param version", and falls back to using "lctl --version" which only shows the lctl tool version.  While the tool version normally is the same, that is not true with the upstream kernel client (since it depends on separately-built Lustre tools), so better to fix that before this patch lands.

I've pushed https://review.whamcloud.com/26047 with "trivial" so it should be processed quickly.  Please review so it can land quickly, and then I'll change this patch to +2.

parents.subject: LU-8843 build: fix all remaining less than 0 comparison for unsigned values

commit.subject: LU-8066 obd: make version_show sysfs compliant
commit.message:
LU-8066 obd: make version_show sysfs compliant

A patch was pushed upstream that added "lustre: "
to the lustre version sysfs file. This was
rejected due to the one item per sysfs rule.
Recently a patch was landed to update the
lustre tools to handle "lustre: " missing. Since
this is the case we can bring the version
sysfs file into compliance.

Change-Id: I74568d581b176c802f132cef3c022fe0fdded164
Signed-off-by: James Simmons <uja.ornl@yahoo.com>
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/25632
Tested-by: Jenkins
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: John L. Hammond <john.hammond@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <andreas.dilger@intel.com>
